name: Railway
summary: Railway is a full-stack cloud platform designed for deploying web applications, servers, and databases with features like automatic scaling, monitoring, and security. It simplifies the deployment process, allowing developers to focus on building their products without the complexities of traditional cloud services.

facts.label: Service Type
facts.value: Full-stack cloud for deploying web apps, servers, and databases

weaknesses: Limited brand recognition compared to larger competitors
opportunities: Expansion into new markets and services
threats: Intense competition from established cloud providers
Rapid technological changes in cloud computing

sources.title: List of U.S. Class I railroads - Wikipedia
Railway | The all-in-one intelligent cloud provider
